summary: Bug Fix Pass - Promotion and Affiliate creation bugs verified fixed. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for both Promotions Manager and Affiliates page.

issues: Console warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop - minor code quality issue

seed_data_creation: None - test data cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) Promotion creation without discount_type/discount_value works - defaults to policy_driven/0. 2) Affiliate CRUD endpoints (GET/POST/DELETE) all working. 3) Commission auto-fetched from affiliate_settings (12% percentage). Admin auth uses localStorage key 'konekt_admin_token'. Login endpoint is /api/admin/auth/login.

details: POST /api/admin/promotions with {name, code, scope, stacking_rule} succeeds
Frontend form shows 'Discount is automatically calculated based on pricing policy settings'
No discount_type or discount_value input fields in form
POST /api/admin/affiliates creates affiliate with auto commission from settings
Form shows Identity section: Name, Phone, Email, Affiliate Code
Payout Setup section with Mobile Money / Bank Transfer toggle
Mobile Money selected: shows Mobile Money Number + Provider fields
Commission section shows 'Automatically managed by system settings' (read-only)
No commission_type or commission_value inputs in form
